headline: POV: Girl Pretends To Be Asleep So Boyfriend Carries Her To Bed, He Puts Blanket On Her On The Couch
summary: The video has 80 million views and has caused approximately 400,000 arguments.
fullBody: TikToker Sofia MainCharacter filmed herself pretending to be asleep on the couch, hoping her boyfriend would carry her to bed. The boyfriend, Jake Reality, simply covered her with a blanket and went to bed alone. 'I was comfortable,' Jake explained. The video has sparked a massive debate: 'Is he lazy or just respecting her sleep?' Sofia has since 'accidentally' fallen asleep on the couch 47 more times. Jake now sleeps on the couch preemptively.
